name: code-kit
description: Code review, evaluation, and fix utilities for quality assurance workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Code review, evaluation, and fix workflow utilities.
interface.longDescription: Utilities for initializing project-specific review skills, evaluating technical claims, generating review reports, fixing review findings, and preparing Neovim LSP environments.
defaultPrompt: Use code-kit:review-init to generate project-specific review skills.
Use code-kit:evaluate to assess this technical claim with evidence.
Use code-kit:fix-review to fix this review finding.
